tools.name: MCP Console
tools.description_en: Inspect and manage the MCP servers your Claude Code install knows about, with clear account-level vs machine-local vs project scope.
tools.description_pt: Inspecione e gerencie os servidores MCP que sua instalação do Claude Code conhece, com escopo claro (conta, máquina ou projeto).

tools.name: WITN
tools.description_en: Where Is The Node? Shows which app every node.exe on the machine belongs to — project, path, listening ports, RAM, CPU — and ends a whole process tree in one click. Ships the witn CLI on your PATH.
tools.description_pt: Where Is The Node? Mostra a qual app pertence cada node.exe da máquina — projeto, caminho, portas em escuta, RAM, CPU — e encerra a árvore inteira num clique. Inclui o CLI witn no seu PATH.
